name: adr009-test-file-splitting
description: Split large Mojo test files into smaller files to avoid heap corruption crashes under high test load (ADR-009). Use when: (1) a Mojo test file exceeds 10 fn test_ functions, (2) CI shows intermittent heap corruption crashes from libKGENCompilerRTShared.so, (3) a CI group has non-deterministic failures consistent with memory pressure.
